grant_title: Massachusetts Awards $11.3 Million to Advance Ocean Technology Innovation
geographic_restrictions: Massachusetts-based applicants, with a focus on New Bedford and the surrounding region
project_area: ocean technology innovation, maritime business incubation, offshore wind development
demographic_requirements: No specific demographic requirements mentioned; focus on business and research entities
eligibility_summary: Eligible applicants include ocean tech startups, maritime businesses, and research institutions operating in Massachusetts, with a preference for projects based in New Bedford or contributing to the state's blue economy.
